changes.description: Replaced 570-line generic SKILL.md with concise version focused on CSV analysis using Python csv/json modules. Added complete examples for pivot analysis and data cleaning patterns.

Added complete working example scripts for both pivot and cleaning tasks. Emphasized using .append() instead of dict comprehensions to avoid syntax errors. Removed f-strings. csv-pivot improved 0→100, but data-clean regressed due to output token truncation.

Shortened scripts further. Replaced f-strings with simple print(). Specified python3 instead of python. Used shorter variable names. data-clean improved 0→85, but dates_standardized count was 7 instead of expected 5.
Fixed dates_standardized counting to use distinct date values (set-based) instead of per-row counting. Both tasks now score 100/100.
